audit_items.proof_trace: All member variables (_lock, _cond, _signaled) are stack-allocated value types with no pointer indirection; all POSIX function calls receive &member addresses which are always valid during object lifetime. The two NULL literals are passed as 'attr' parameters to pthread_mutex_init/pthread_cond_init per POSIX convention and are never dereferenced by code in this file. No dereference operator (*ptr) appears anywhere in the file.
